generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D point cloud acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera for stereo vision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StereoVisionDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle speed, position, and orientation for state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]

instance StereoVisionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance StereoVisionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo vision data from Intel RealSense D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StereoVisionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SqlDatabase
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data from LiDAR processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance Ros2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NvidiaJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SqlDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and ego vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller driving Motor and Steering Servo"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator driven by Vedder Electronic Speed Controller"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo actuator controlled by the system"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Digital Twin instance"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Handling resource-specific functionality and automotive tasks like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Managing data processing and control mechanisms"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "User interface for monitoring and management"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Entity"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:DTComponent [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Entity"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwin
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle retrofitted with advanced sensor and control technology"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, Motor, SteeringServo, DigitalTwin
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN for raw LiDAR point cloud clustering and Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance AccModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Ros2Middleware
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, DataSavingInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system processing—lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands—to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and triggering emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccEnableAction, AccDisableAction, DesiredSpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingTriggerAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data and object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object track data for later analysis"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generating operational reports from collected data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicle presence for ACC functionality"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computing desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending actuation commands to physical actuators based on ACC processing"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AccEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AccDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control functionality"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingTriggerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for adaptive cruise control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering servo are generated by the Controlling FE and transmitted via ROS2 network to Actuation FE components. Data Translation handles serialization and unit conversion of control messages. Inter-entity communication for command delivery uses Wi-Fi UDP protocol. Control signals are processed by Actuation FE to drive physical actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces a 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to support computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations as per industry standards."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture adheres to ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages. Each package contains one or more ROS2 nodes, organized into Physical Twin Entity (deviating from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality), Digital Twin Entity (data management), and User Entity (UI components). This structure enables coordinated execution across distributed hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer. Network latency is maintained at most 100 ms (R7) and clock synchronization accuracy is 100 ms (R8) to ensure real-time synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Data is stored in a SQL database on a device external to the vehicle. Entities are deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, with scalability achieved through distributed processing and external storage for data persistence."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to ISO 23247:2021, a manufacturing-specific framework with four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The reference architecture (Part 2) employs an entity-based structure where Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs) are physically observable items (e.g., equipment, facilities), Data Collection and Device Control Entities handle data acquisition and control of OMEs, Digital Twin Entities provide digital representations of OMEs, and User Entities offer interfaces for monitoring and control. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity handle specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, or user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as a potential implementation for FEs."
]
